corpus_meta.name: Whale Replay Corpus V2 — Portfolio Intelligence
corpus_meta.description: Portfolio-level replay corpus for W2 Whale Domain. 71 cases (C101-C171) covering portfolio structure, exposure metrics, liquidation clusters, leverage, coordinated behavior, portfolio changes, entity profiles, and edge cases. No network, no random, no system clock.

cases.description: 1 address, 1 coin, long — simplest single-position portfolio
cases.notes: Baseline run with single long position. Leverage 9.9 below HIGH_WEIGHTED_LEVERAGE (10.0).
Two addresses both long BTC. HHI = 0.625^2 + 0.375^2 = 0.53125.
BTC long (4.55% liq dist, within 5%). BTC dominates 98.6%.
All ETH shorts. HHI=0.1888 (well distributed). Liq distances 6.17-17.34%.

cases.description: 20 addresses, 10 coins, mixed — large diversified portfolio
cases.notes: Large diversified portfolio. BTC dominates (3.25M of 4.33M). 20 addresses, 10 coins.

cases.description: Net near zero but gross high (13M)
cases.notes: Net zero but gross 13M > 10M (PR3). Weighted lev=10 exactly (PR6). L/S=1.0.
Single addr 9.75M out of 9.78M (99.7%). PR12 (>70% triggered). Gross 9.78M < 10M.
Each ~324K-325K. HHI=0.2005 (near min 0.2 for 5 equal). No risk rules.
All BTC (100% same-coin > 50%, PR5). Short liq_dist=3.03% (within 5%).
Stablecoins only. All lev=1, no liq prices, no P&L. HHI=0.4082.

cases.description: Same-coin opposing: 2 long, 1 short on same coin
cases.notes: All ETH (100% same-coin > 50% triggers PR5). L/S=2.0. HHI=0.3086.
All 3 long BTC (100% same-coin > 50%, PR5). Y liq dist=4.55%, Z=3.03%.
BTC 5.2M (82%), ETH 900K (14.2%), SOL 240K (3.8%). BTC single-coin concentration = 0.82 > 0.5. Gross=6.34M<10M.
Extreme L/S=1805. 1st addr dominates 99.94% (PR12). HHI=0.9989.
Top-1=0.8 exactly (PR4 triggers at >=0.8). HHI=0.8^2+0.2^2=0.68.
Top-3: 1.95M+900K+600K=3.45M/3.69M=93.5%. No risk rules triggered.
Winners: BTC +60K, ETH +28.9K (750K total). Losers: SOL -25K, ARB -55K (350K total). SOL liq dist=(125-120)/125*100=4% (within 5%).
Only active BTC position counts. Zero-size positions have pv=0, lev=0. Gross=650K, addr_cnt=1 (not 3), coin_cnt=1 (not 3).

cases.description: Stale snapshot older than previous excluded
cases.notes: Current snapshot time (16th) is earlier than previous (17th). Stale position is excluded. Only 1 addr considered.
All 3 within 2% (PR1). Liq dists: A=1.97%, B=1.82%, C=1.67%. Also PR2 (within 5%). All BTC => PR5.
A liq dist=3.79%, B=3.03% (both <=5% PR2). C=16.18% outside. NOT PR1 (none <=2%).
Liq dists: A=16.67%, B=21.77%, C=20%. No PR1 or PR2. All safe.

cases.description: Mix of null liq and critical liq
cases.notes: A and C have no liq price. B has liq dist=1.66% (within 2%, PR1+PR2). Only B counts in clusters.
Liq dist exactly 2.0%. Should trigger both PR1 (<=2%) and PR2 (<=5%).
Liq dist exactly 5.0%. Should trigger PR2 (<=5%) but NOT PR1 (>2%).
Liq dists: A=24.24%, B=32.94%, C=24%. None within 5%. No risk rules.
Both shorts within 2%. A liq dist=1.42%, B=1.14%. PR1+PR2 triggered on short side.
Long A=3.03% (within 5%), Short B=1.69% (within 2%), Safe C=12%. PR1 for B, PR2 for A+B.
Weighted lev=(650K*15+9K*12)/659K=14.96>10 (PR6). Both positions have high individual leverage.
Single position weighted lev=10.0 exactly. PR6 triggers at >=10.0.
Weighted lev=13.47>10 (PR6). Individual: BTC 15x, ETH 5x, SOL 2x.
Individual lev: 2x, 1.5x, 1x. All well below threshold. No PR6.

cases.description: Weighted leverage calculation with zeros excluded
cases.notes: Zero-size position has pv=0. Weighted lev = 650K*5/650K = 5.0. Zero excluded. addr_cnt=1.

cases.description: 2 addresses same-direction build on BTC (3 min window)
cases.notes: A: 10->15 (build_long), B: 8->12 (build_long). Both within 3 min window (12:00, 12:01). C unchanged.
A: 15->8, B: 10->5, C: 6->3. All ETH, all reduce_long, within 2 min window.

cases.description: 2 addresses coordinated flip long->short on SOL
cases.notes: A: +50->-100 SOL (flip_long_to_short), B: +30->-50 SOL (flip_long_to_short). Both within 1 min.

cases.description: 2 addresses coordinated flip short->long on BTC
cases.notes: A: -5->+8 BTC (flip_short_to_long), B: -3->+5 BTC (flip_short_to_long). Both within 30 sec.

cases.description: Divergent: 2 build, 1 reduces on same coin
cases.notes: A: 8->12 build, B: 5->8 build, C: 6->3 reduce. All BTC. Divergent signals on same coin.
A: BTC 30->50 (big delta +1.3M), B: ETH 50->100 (smaller delta +90K). Different coins, both build.
A: BTC 5->10, B: ETH 10->20, C: SOL 200->500. All build_long but across different coins.

cases.description: Out-of-window actions — 30 min apart, should NOT match coordination
cases.notes: Both build BTC but timestamps 12:00 and 12:30 are >5 min apart. Should NOT trigger coordinated action.

cases.description: Single address — cannot form multi-addr coordination
cases.notes: Only 1 address building. Single-address action cannot trigger multi-address coordinated detection.
Both addresses now within 2% liq (PR1). Previous was 6.06% and 4.55% (only B was in 5%). Cluster formed.
Gross grew from 975K to 2.01M (+106%). SOL position is new. Expected portfolio changes: gross_expansion, new_coin.
Gross from 1.55M to 650K (-58%). ETH position fully exited. Expected: gross_reduction, coin_exited.

cases.description: Net direction shift from long to short
cases.notes: Prev: long 975K. Curr: short 660K. Net shifted from +975K to -660K. flip_long_to_short.
BTC grew relative to ETH. Top1 share increased from 95.6% to 97.3%.
Prev: 100% BTC. Curr: ETH 360K, ARB 300K, SOL 240K. Top1 decreased from 1.0 to 0.4.
Same position size (10 BTC), leverage increased from 5x to 12x. Weighted lev from 5.0 to 12.0. PR6 triggered.
Same position size, leverage decreased from 10x to 3x.

cases.description: Liquidation cluster formed (were safe, now within 2%)
cases.notes: Both positions moved into critical zone (<2%). A went from 6.06% to 1.97%. B from 10.59% to 1.38%.

cases.description: New coin entered (SOL added to existing BTC)
cases.notes: SOL position is new. BTC existed previously. Expected change: new_coin_entered.
ETH position is gone. BTC remains. Expected change: coin_exited.

cases.description: Entity with 2 addresses (same entity label pattern)
cases.notes: Addresses 0xportfolio_G_156a and 0xportfolio_G_156b share 'Entity Alpha' label prefix. Grouped as one entity.
Entity Beta has 5 addresses with different coins. Gross=460K, 5 coins, 5 addresses.

cases.description: Entity with mixed direction (long and short)
cases.notes: Same entity 'Gamma' holds both long BTC (10) and short BTC (-5). Net neutral on same coin.
Single address with no known entity. 'Unknown Trader' label has no entity profile match.

cases.description: Entity with stale data quality (old timestamp)
cases.notes: Alpha address has stale timestamp (June 16 vs June 17). Beta is fresh. Data quality flagged as partial/stale.
Zero positions. All metrics should return null or zero. No risk rules, no changes.

cases.description: All zero-size positions — nothing to compute
cases.notes: Both positions have signed_size=0, pv=0. Should be ignored. Gross=0, addr_cnt=0, coin_cnt=0.
Same address+coin appears twice. Both should be counted separately in gross. Gross=975K.
Coins 'SHIBELON' and 'PEPECASH' are not standard. Should still be processed correctly. Gross=4200.
mark_price=0. liq_dist cannot compute (returns None). Normal metrics still work.
liquidation_price=None. liq_dist=None. Does not count toward liq clusters. No PR1/PR2.
Timestamp is June 18 (future). Domain should not reject based on future timestamps.

cases.description: Time-ordered inputs — oldest first in list
cases.notes: Positions listed oldest-first (12:00, 12:05). Should still compute correctly. Gross=668K.

cases.description: Float jitter on portfolio level — tiny size variations
cases.notes: Sizes have tiny fractional .0001 differences. Should not trigger change detection. Gross=686006.68.

cases.description: Boundary thresholds — 1M pv, 10x lev, 5% liq dist
cases.notes: Position value exactly 1M (LARGE_POSITION boundary). Leverage exactly 10x (HIGH_LEVERAGE boundary). Liq price=62700 gives (66000-62700)/66000*100=5.0% exactly (LIQ_CLUSTER_5PCT boundary).
All positions are long. short_exposure=0, l/s_ratio=null. Simple long-only portfolio of 3 coins.
